compiled_state.title: [implementation-plan]: ticket created for planned task -> description empty and task details placed in comment instead
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
### 2. Incident Overview

* **Scenario Type:** User-Flagged Behavior (reported by host project using the DSO plugin)

#### Expected Behavior

When \`/dso:implementation-plan\` creates a task ticket for a planned work item, the full task description (requirements, acceptance criteria, files to modify, testing mode, etc.) should be written into the ticket's \`description\` field via \`.claude/scripts/dso ticket create task "<title>" -d "<description>"\`. Comments should be reserved for post-creation notes, progress updates, and clarifications — not the primary task specification.

#### Actual Behavior

Host project reports that \`/dso:implementation-plan\` creates task tickets with an EMPTY description field, and writes the task details (the body of the plan — scope, acceptance criteria, implementation notes) as one or more ticket comments instead.

Consequences reported by the host:
* \`.claude/scripts/dso ticket show <id>\` returns \`description: ""\` or \`description: null\`, making it harder for downstream tooling and humans to see the task scope without expanding comments.
* Jira sync (when enabled) maps \`description\` → Jira issue body; an empty description yields a blank Jira ticket while the substantive content lives in comment threads.
* Sub-agents dispatched to execute the task receive the empty description as context and must fetch comments separately to reconstruct the spec.

### 3. Technical Environment

* Skill: \`plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md\`
* Ticket CLI: \`.claude/scripts/dso ticket create task\` (accepts \`-d/--description\`)
* Reported by: host project consuming the DSO plugin (not reproduced in this repo during the report)

### 4. Action History

* User-reported only. No reproduction attempted yet in this session. No prior fix attempts recorded.

### 5. Investigation Pointers (non-speculative)

Points where the skill or its dispatched sub-agents generate task tickets:
* The implementation-plan SKILL.md task-creation section (grep for \`ticket create task\`)
* Any prompt template under \`plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/prompts/\` that instructs an agent to file tickets
* Any shared prompt template that wraps ticket creation (e.g., \`skills/shared/prompts/\` if referenced by implementation-plan)

The defect likely sits in one of:
1. The skill instructs the agent to invoke \`ticket create task\` without the \`-d\` flag, then follow with \`ticket comment\` — the comments become the de-facto description.
2. The skill invokes \`ticket create task\` with an empty or placeholder \`-d\` argument, then appends the actual spec via comments.
3. The skill's prompt template does not require the agent to pass the task body to \`-d\`, causing variance across agents.

comments.body: Classification: llm-behavioral — dual signals present: (1) ticket describes agent creating empty task descriptions (behavior drift/skill misinterpretation), (2) affected file is plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md in skills/. Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Investigation complete — root cause confirmed: Positional Bias (taxonomy item 11). Step 5 '### Create Tasks' contains a bare ticket create command WITHOUT -d (lines 823-826) as the first operative template; the correct HEREDOC form with -d appears later under 'Acceptance criteria format' sub-section (framed as reference, not imperative). Fix: remove bare code block, rename sub-section header to 'Required command form'. Confidence: high. Hypothesis test: confirmed empirically.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fix implemented in commit 5df4e90f (branch worktree-20260417-111430). Cannot auto-close due to pre-existing bug 2f20-eb16 (O(N) open-children scan across 16,655 ticket dirs causes SIGURG at ~73s). CLOSE PENDING: manually transition to closed once 2f20-eb16 is resolved. --reason should be: 'Fixed: Removed bare ticket create task example in Step 5 that lacked -d flag. Consolidated into single operative template with -d required. Added structural boundary test to prevent regression.'
comments.author: Test
